member.name: F:GTA.EnterVehicleFlags.WarpIfDoorIsBlocked
member.summary:
Allow ped to warp to the seat if entry is blocked. If the shuffle link to that seat is blocked by someone but the entry point for the shuffle link is not directly blocked, the
won't warp. Consider using
if you want the
to warp when the direct door and the shuffle link to that seat is blocked by someone.
